title: View with ORDER BY misses a row
poc: CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 INT PRIMARY KEY);
SELECT 1 FROM t1 ORDER BY count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY min(t1.c0));
CREATE VIEW v AS SELECT 1 FROM t1 ORDER BY count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY min(t1.c0));
key_bug_features: ORDER BY removal in view context leads to empty result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 INT PRIMARY KEY, c1 VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, c2 DATE);
INSERT INTO t1 (c0, c1, c2) VALUES (1, 'test', NULL);
CREATE VIEW v AS SELECT 1 FROM t1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY c1);
SELECT 1 FROM t1 WHERE c2 IS NULL ORDER BY c0;
